title: phyllanthus ceratostemon
intro: Phyllanthus ceratostemon, also known as the spiny leaf-flowered tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to support liver function, reduce stress, and improve immune system function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus ceratostemon can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat conditions such as hepatitis and jaundice.
